title: Bounded Worker Pool, Origin Fairness, Cancellation, and Shutdown
description: The scheduler launches one goroutine per source, results block after cancellation, one origin occupies all workers, panics leak claims, and shutdown exits before commits settle. Learners cumulatively produce bounded origin-aware ingestion worker pool through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Derive global, tenant, origin, database, memory, and queue budgets and enforce the minimum active constraint.
Assign producers, closers, receivers, buffers, and terminal states so sends, closes, and drains cannot race or block forever.
Prevent one publisher from consuming all slots while preserving useful throughput and explicit per-origin limits.
